name: Containers — Docker
summary: List, inspect, restart Docker containers on this server. Use command.run.

commands.name: list
commands.description: List running containers. Use for: 'show containers', 'what is running', 'docker ps'.

commands.name: logs
commands.description: Show last 50 lines of container logs. Replace <name> with container name.

commands.name: stats
commands.description: Show CPU and RAM usage per container.
